title: Add Makefile with plugin-skills target
description: User wants a Makefile target that runs generate-plugin-skills with --bump, then commits and pushes the result. Single command to sync skills, bump version, and ship.

title: Add generate-plugin-skills script to sync .agents/skills into plugin
description: Currently plugins/kf/skills/ is maintained by hand. Skills installed via the claude skill manager land in .agents/skills/ but must be manually copied into the plugin with their references/ subdirectories. This creates drift (ui-animation is missing 8 reference files; ui-ux-pro-max is missing entirely). A generator script reading skills-lock.json as the manifest would make syncing reliable and repeatable: copy SKILL.md + references/ from .agents/skills/<name>/ into plugins/kf/skills/<name>/, skipping skills from anthropics/skills (official marketplace), and optionally auto-bumping the plugin patch version.

title: Port Playwright MCP server config for in-session browser debugging
description: Add @playwright/mcp MCP server to .claude/settings.json so Claude can drive a real browser during debugging sessions (navigate pages, read console, inspect network, take screenshots). Sourced from historical-maps-v2 tooling harvest 2026-04-17. Steps: add mcpServers block to .claude/settings.json with playwright entry using 'npx @playwright/mcp@latest'. No install required — npx pulls on demand. Requires Playwright browsers on host; run 'npx playwright install chromium' if not present.
